_meta.description: MobSF manifest-level baseline findings for DIVA APK. DIVA is an intentionally vulnerable Android app by Payatu used for security training.

mobsf_findings.description: android:debuggable=true allows attaching a debugger to the process, enabling runtime inspection and memory tampering.

mobsf_findings.issue_title: Application Data can be Backed Up
mobsf_findings.description: android:allowBackup=true allows application data to be backed up via adb, potentially exposing sensitive data.

mobsf_findings.issue_title: Clear Text Traffic Is Enabled For App
mobsf_findings.description: Application allows cleartext HTTP traffic. For targetSdkVersion < 28, cleartext is allowed by default when usesCleartextTraffic is not explicitly set.

mobsf_findings.issue_title: App can be installed on a vulnerable older version of android
mobsf_findings.description: minSdkVersion 15 (Android 4.0.3 ICS) is critically outdated (< API 19/KitKat). Devices running these versions have unpatched OS-level vulnerabilities.

Multiple activities/providers are exported without requiring any permission, allowing any app on the device to interact with them. DIVA has 13+ exported activities via intent-filter implicit export (targetSdk < 31) and 2 exported content providers.

expected_absent.reason: No non-default taskAffinity attributes (no StrandHogg v1)
No singleTask launchMode activities (no StrandHogg v2)

summary.notes: MobSF reports exactly 5 manifest-level findings for DIVA. Our scanner should match all 5 and produce at most 1 additional finding (< 20% FP rate).
